title: Obyknovennoe chudo
writer: Erast Garin, Khesya Lokshina, Evgeniy Shvarts
actors: Aleksey Konsovskiy, Nina Zorskaya, Oleg Vidov
plot: How difficult it is to be a real person. This was fully felt "in his own skin" by the bear, whom the wizard turned into a beautiful young man. The most terrible was the condition set by the magician.
